# TowerIQ — AI Portfolio Intelligence Platform

> TowerIQ is the AI Portfolio Intelligence platform for CIOs and technology leaders. It auto-discovers, governs, and optimizes every AI deployment across your organization.

TowerIQ gives technology leaders a unified view of every AI deployment — what it costs, what it risks, and what it's worth. Know every AI. Govern with confidence. Optimize every dollar.

## Core Capabilities

- **AI Auto-Discovery**: Automatically detect and catalog every AI tool, model, and deployment across your enterprise — including shadow AI.
- **AI Governance**: Enforce policies aligned with EU AI Act, ISO 42001, NIST AI RMF, and SR 11-7 compliance frameworks.
- **Cost & ROI Optimization**: Track AI spend across departments and optimize investments with full cost attribution and ROI analysis.
- **Risk Management**: Continuously assess AI risk across bias, security, compliance, and operational dimensions.
- **Integration Hub**: Connects to your existing tech stack — ServiceNow, Jira, Slack, SSO providers, and more.

## Industries Served

- Financial Services & Banking
- Healthcare & Life Sciences
- Government & Public Sector
- Technology & SaaS
- Manufacturing & Supply Chain
